summary: Phase 6B Contracts & Consent System - All features verified. Backend: 22/22 API tests passed. Frontend: ContractsTab and ClientPortal fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/contracts/templates/list - returns 6 templates (PHOTOGRAPHY_SHOOT, PORTRAIT_COMMISSION, LOGO_DESIGN, WEB_DESIGN, GENERAL_SERVICE, CUSTOM)
POST /api/leads/:leadId/contracts - creates contract with DRAFT status
GET /api/leads/:leadId/contracts - lists contracts for lead
GET /api/contracts/:id - returns single contract
PATCH /api/contracts/:id - edits DRAFT contract title and content
PATCH /api/contracts/:id - rejects edit for SENT/AGREED contracts
DELETE /api/contracts/:id - deletes DRAFT contract only
POST /api/contracts/:id/send - changes status to SENT
POST /api/contracts/:id/agree - public endpoint, changes status to AGREED
GET /api/portal/:token - includes contracts with SENT/VIEWED/AGREED status
Frontend: ContractsTab visible in LeadDetailModal
Frontend: New Contract button opens template selector
Frontend: 6 template cards displayed with icons and labels
Frontend: Contract editor opens after template selection
Frontend: Title and Content inputs editable
Frontend: Live preview of contract HTML
Frontend: Contracts list shows status badges (Draft/Sent/Signed)
Frontend: Contracts expandable via chevron
ClientPortal: Contracts section with SENT contracts visible
ClientPortal: Agree checkbox initially unchecked
ClientPortal: Sign Agreement button disabled until checkbox checked
ClientPortal: Checkbox click enables Sign Agreement button
ClientPortal: Sign Agreement changes status to AGREED
ClientPortal: Green 'Agreement Successfully Signed!' confirmation shown
ClientPortal: Signed contracts show green 'Agreement Signed' badge
critical_code_review_comments: Contracts API properly validates template types and contract status for edit/delete
Portal token validation correct for public agree endpoint
Client IP captured on agreement for audit trail
ContractsTab correctly handles loading, error states, and empty states
Template selector has proper icons and labels for each template type
Contract editor has live HTML preview
ClientPortal shows appropriate UI state for SENT vs AGREED contracts
seed_data_creation: Multiple test contracts created during pytest run (DRAFT status, can be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6B Contracts system fully tested. Key data-testids: tab-contracts, new-contract-btn, template-selector, template-{type}, contract-editor, contract-title-input, contract-content-input, save-contract-btn, contract-{id}, edit-contract-{id}, delete-contract-{id}, send-contract-{id}. ClientPortal data-testids: contracts-section, portal-contract-{id}, agree-checkbox-{id}, sign-agreement-btn-{id}, contract-agreed-{id}. Session persistence may time out between Playwright navigation - use single flow tests.

backend_apis.templates_list: 6 templates returned with type, title, label
backend_apis.edit_contract: DRAFT only, title and content editable
backend_apis.send_contract: Status changes to SENT, email notification triggered
backend_apis.agree_contract: Public endpoint, status changes to AGREED, IP captured

frontend_contracts_tab.template_selector: 6 templates with icons (Camera, Palette, PenTool, Globe, Briefcase, FileEdit)
frontend_contracts_tab.contract_editor: Title input, HTML content textarea, live preview
frontend_contracts_tab.actions: Edit (DRAFT only), Delete (DRAFT only), Send to Client, Resend

frontend_client_portal.agree_flow: Checkbox + disabled Sign Agreement button until checked
